title: Ship Definition
description: Defines a playable or NPC ship in the NovaForge universe.

id.description: Unique ship identifier following the pattern ship_<class>_<name>.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the ship.

class.description: Ship class that determines base role and docking category.

hull_points.description: Base structural hit points before destruction.

mass.description: Ship mass in metric tonnes, affects inertia and fuel consumption.

max_speed.description: Maximum velocity in metres per second.

description.description: Flavour text shown in the ship catalogue.

cargo_capacity.description: Cargo hold volume in cubic metres.

turn_rate.description: Rotational speed in degrees per second.

tags.description: Freeform tags for filtering and scripting.
